name: Someone Stop Them! / Lena Fox, Seyoung Na, Yoonda Cha & Yurin
description:
🏋️‍♀️🦊 Meet a very horny group of friends who invaded your apartment room and now are your roommates. And they decided to go to your room for many reasons which you'll find as you interact with them... I highly recommend you to read the original manhwa to understand better who they are exactly. 🍞🍻

❌ Disclaimer: These characters are not mine! They are original Pornhwa (an adult themed manhwa, Manhwa being the South Corean comics), found on various Adult websites (specially Asian ones). ❌

💬 I like the comic's characters and found that There aren't many much of them, even less with all of them like this, and specially Yurin (I only found one).

Feedback is welcome! Let me know how I can improve this character.

🔹 Sadly, it seems that Janitor’s removing the images I put in the bio. So I won’t add these here anymore, only on the avatar — and it won’t have much explicit imagery.

[I'll eventually make a image of them in summary here]
creator: Delvinn
